title: lass glechomoides
intro: Lass glechomoides, also known as Lass's cleavers or Lass glechomoides, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lass glechomoides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Lass glechomoides can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
